author: Sascha D. Kasper
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Embedded terminal panel powered by xterm.js and node-pty - no external windows.

manifest.author: LeanProductivity
manifest.description: Embedded terminal panel powered by xterm.js and node-pty - no external windows.
manifest.name: Lean Terminal

name: Lean Terminal

releases.author: sdkasper
releases.description:
**v1.3.0 release: image paste/drop, clickable paths, key handler API, and 4 critical security fixes**

## Features

- **Image paste/drop**: Clipboard images and dropped images are now pasted as file attachments
- **Clickable file paths**: Terminal output containing file paths are now rendered as clickable links to open files in Obsidian
- **Public registerKeyHandler API**: New extensibility API allowing plugins to register custom key handlers with the terminal

## Security Fixes

- **SEC-01 [HIGH]**: Shell injection in quotePath — now escapes embedded quotes (POSIX \'\'\' and Windows \"\")
- **SEC-02 [HIGH]**: Unsanitized resumeCommand from workspace state — now validates against claude --resume uuid pattern
- **SEC-03 [MEDIUM]**: Path traversal in Claude session scan — now validates claudeSessionsDir is absolute with no .. segments
- **SEC-04 [MEDIUM]**: Temp clipboard image files world-readable — now created with 0o600 (owner-only) permissions

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md) for full details.

## What's Changed
* docs: update README for v1.2.0 shell detection and per-OS path settings by @sdkasper in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/78
* feat: attach images on paste and drop by @glebo309 in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/80
* Release: v1.3.0 - Image paste/drop and clickable file paths (PR #80 + #81) by @sdkasper in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/83
* feat: make file paths clickable by @glebo309 in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/81
* feat: public registerKeyHandler API for composable terminal key bindings (#76) by @BrandonABarringer in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/82
* Fix: resolve merge conflict markers by @sdkasper in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/84
* Fix: replace deprecated activeLeaf API by @sdkasper in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/85
* Release 1.3.0: Image paste/drop, clickable paths, key handler API, security fixes by @sdkasper in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/86
* bump: version 1.3.0 by @sdkasper in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/87

## New Contributors
* @glebo309 made their first contribution in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/80
* @BrandonABarringer made their first contribution in https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/pull/82

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/sdkasper/lean-obsidian-terminal/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0
